documentation.description:
A type to format tables according to the max length of fields. The table
is ANSI-aware, so it will work properly for text with embedded ANSI
control sequences. However, non-left-aligned text may not align
properly.

array_types.name: Alignments
array_types.code: type Alignments is array (Positive range <>) of Ada.Strings.Alignment;

record_types.name: Reference
record_types.code: type Reference (Table : access Table_IO.Table'Class) is limited null record;

subprograms.name: Append
subprograms.code: function Append (T : aliased in out Table; Cell : String) return Reference

subprograms.name: Append
subprograms.code: procedure Append (T : in out Table; Cell : String)

subprograms.name: Header
Header
subprograms.code: procedure Header (T : in out Table; Cell : String)

documentation.description:
Headers are printed as given, but are keep internally for the structured
output as field names. There should be as many headers as columns.

subprograms.name: Print
Print

documentation.description:
Will print the table using GNAT.IO, unless Put_Line is supplied
FIXME:  Align is currently ignored
